meaning: adj.缁撴灉瀹炵殑,鍔犳按鏋滆皟鍛崇殑
examples: In the past, the tree fruited every year.
American red-fruited hawthorn with dense corymbs of pink-red flowers.
The fruited plain did little for the idea of brotherhood until brotherhood took things into its own hands.
It is bright and exotically fruited with a foundation layer of campfire smoke.
